description: Letter from Ya’aqov b. Salman al-Hariri, from Alexandria, to Nahray b. Nissim, Fustat. June 23 1057. The main part of the letter deals with a trading business of dates that ended with the loss of 12 dinars. Also mentions ordering fabrics from Alexandria. The writer has a problem with a record of taxes he owes. In addition, mentions information about the dirhams’ rate and the process of making textile goods. (Information from Gil, Kingdom, Vol. 4, #663) VMR
description_he: מכתב מיעקב בן סלמן אל-חריר, אלכסנדריה, לנהראי בן ניסים, פוסטאט, 23 ביוני 1057, על עסק תמרים שהפסיד 12 דינרים ועל מסים
